name: Amoxil
description: A penicillin antibiotic used to treat many different types of infection caused by bacteria, such as tonsillitis, bronchitis, pneumonia, and infections of the ear, nose, throat, skin, or urinary tract.
precautions: Do not use if you are allergic to amoxicillin or to any other penicillin antibiotic. Finish the entire course of medication.
